projects.name: API Gateway Refactor
projects.recentActivity: Merged PR #142 adding rate-limiting middleware to all public endpoints.
projects.description: Refactoring the legacy API gateway to support gRPC and REST simultaneously. The new architecture reduces cold-start latency by 40%.

projects.name: Design System v2
projects.recentActivity: Published Storybook build to GitHub Pages; component audit is 80% complete.
projects.description: Rebuilding the shared component library with accessible-first patterns and full dark-mode support. Targets all internal product teams.

projects.name: Data Pipeline Observability
projects.recentActivity: Deployed OpenTelemetry collectors to staging; dashboards are live in Grafana.
projects.description: Adding end-to-end tracing and alerting across the ETL pipeline to surface bottlenecks and SLA breaches in real time.

projects.name: Mobile App Authentication
projects.recentActivity: Biometric login failing intermittently on Android 14 devices; investigation ongoing.
projects.description: Implementing passkey and biometric authentication for the iOS and Android apps. Release is gating the Q3 security compliance deadline.

projects.name: Search Indexing Service
projects.recentActivity: Blocked on procurement approval for the Elasticsearch cloud tier upgrade.
projects.description: Migrating full-text search from a self-hosted Solr cluster to a managed Elasticsearch service. Expected to cut indexing latency by 60%.

projects.name: Internal Docs Portal
projects.recentActivity: Content migration from Confluence is complete; SEO meta tags added to all pages.
projects.description: Building a static-site documentation portal using Astro and MDX to replace the company's aging Confluence space.
